reviews.comment:
Bien con lo justo. Observé falta de personal para tantas actividades, el playero no podía con todo más alla de su muy buena predisposición. Falla de la cabeza que organiza.
Los precios? Hasta un 40 % más caros que en licalidades similares.
Hay para mejorar bastante.

(Translated by Google)
It was just okay. I noticed a lack of staff for so many activities; the beach attendant couldn't handle everything despite his very good attitude. It's a failure on the part of the management.
The prices? Up to 40% more expensive than in similar locations. There's a lot of room for improvement.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1037497486456345522/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUN5ei1ucllnEAE

reviews.comment:
Excelente siempre ! Desde que vivo en esta zona del norte neuquino la mejor atencion y predisposicion de todo su personal! Muy agradecida!

(Translated by Google)
Always excellent! Since I've lived in this area of ​​northern Neuquén, I've received the best service and helpfulness from all the staff! Very grateful!
